headline: Why Is Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Up 1.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Stanley Black & Decker, Lowers Price Target to $84
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Chris Snyder   maintains Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $87 to $84.
